description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a tactical, dark gray uniform featuring a prominent white skull emblem on the chest. He wears a heavy-duty, armored vest with reinforced shoulder pads and a high collar, providing both protection and a commanding presence. The uniform includes long sleeves, fitted tactical pants, and sturdy black boots, all designed for urban operations. A utility belt is visible, equipped with pouches and holsters for carrying essential gear. The officer's face is stern, with short, neatly groomed hair, and he does not wear any headgear. Patches and insignia are present on the upper arms, further identifying his law enforcement role.
description: A male police officer in a dark tactical uniform with a white skull emblem, armored vest, and utility belt, ready for urban duty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the officer's face, white skull chest emblem, armored vest, and utility belt details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the armored vest, utility belt, and arm patches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, pants, and boots, with no visible insignia or equipment details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the vest, belt, and arm patch.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long sleeves, dark gray color, armored vest with high collar, fitted tactical pants, and black boots.
attribute_headgear_style: No headgear; short, neatly groomed hair visible.
